notes: 28yo ICU nurse working 3 night shifts/week. Plantar fasciitis diagnosed Nov 2025 from long standing hours at work — wore unsupportive shoes for months before. Now using orthotics. Goal is building overall strength and resilience. Very coachable and motivated but energy can be unpredictable depending on shift schedule — always check readiness before starting. Sees me biweekly.
